title: LG’s monitors come with an unwanted addition for Windows: McAfee pop-up ads
summary: The LG Monitor App Installer installs itself by default and has started pushing unwanted ad notifications to users’ screens. The LG Monitor App Installer installs itself by default and has started pushing unwanted ad notifications to users’ screens.
